title: Thai Basil Curry
description: A flavorful and aromatic Thai-inspired curry made with fresh Thai basil, resinous curry paste, and your choice of protein. Serve with steamed rice or noodles for a delicious and satisfying meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large pan over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced red bell pepper and cook until tender, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 2-3 minutes.
Add the chopped Thai basil and cook for 1 minute.
Add the curry paste and cook for 1-2 minutes, until fragrant.
Add the coconut milk and bring the mixture to a simmer.
Add the chicken breast and cook until cooked through, about 5-7 minutes.
Season with fish sauce, soy sauce, salt, and black pepper to taste.
Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
